description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pointed nose, designed for high-speed flight. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and positioned near the front of the fuselage, likely accommodating a single pilot. The wings are short, straight, and mounted low on the body, each featuring small winglets at the tips for aerodynamic efficiency. The rear of the airplane is equipped with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The engine is integrated into the rear fuselage, with a prominent exhaust nozzle visible at the back. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable and currently stowed.
description: A streamlined, modern airplane with a pointed nose, low-mounted straight wings with winglets, and a single rear engine. The cockpit is enclosed and positioned forward, with a conventional tail and likely retractable landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical low-mounted wings with winglets.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, enclosed cockpit, and the rear engine integrated into the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the prominent engine exhaust nozzle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cockpit, wing, and rear engine details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and small upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
